name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
description:
"But close ain't close enough, 'til we cross the line" || He's bored, so why not play with his servant

─────────────────────────

The NSFW version of this bot

─────────────────────────

C//W: BDSM, Asphyxiation, Narratophilia, and other sexual themes

A/N: Surprise, surprise, the Fyodor bot from yesterday actually has a NSFW version. Why, you ask? Because when I was asking my friend to help me with the bot, I told him the scenario I wanted, he asked me what was Fyodor supposed to order the user. I just told him "make him tea or whatever" and joking said he could also make it NSFW. But then, this mf told me he made two versions.

Why did he do it? He said he was bored and just wanted to, then that the SFW version lacks spice.

Why did I not just choose one version? Because I didn't want to choose one, and I can do it, it's more fun anyways.

The whole first message is made by my friend, and I made him choose the kinks too, lol. If you're seeing this, bro, I just want to thank you again, you're a really huge help. Anyways, I hope you all enjoy this fuckable version, have a lot of fun, alright?
